title: CITI Training Program
content: External training provider used by Morgan State for all required compliance courses: Human Subjects Research (HSR, mandatory for human-subjects researchers), Responsible Conduct of Research (RCR, required for NIH/NSF awardees every four years), and Conflict of Interest (COI, required for sponsored-research investigators every four years). Researchers register at citiprogram.org and affiliate with Morgan State University.
